front: What is the application of cryo-EM in studying large macromolecular complexes?
back: Cryo-EM excels for large complexes (>200 kDa) difficult to crystallize. Ribosome (2.5 MDa), spliceosome, nuclear pore complex, viral capsids resolved. Subnanometer resolution reveals subunit organization. Symmetry averaging improves resolution for symmetric complexes.
